headline: Merck To Rally More Than 16%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Wednesday
summary: Wall St analysts changed outlook on top names. KBW cut AON PT to $400, Barclay's cut T PT to $24, MS cut ROL PT to $65, GS cut SAM PT to $169, BofA raised ALLY PT to $53, Citi raised EW PT to $110, Wells Fargo raised MRK PT to $150, Jefferies raised ENVA PT.
